title: Meet Aman Gottumukkala: Indian-origin founder joining xAI after building a million-dollar startup with just a three-person team
summary_full: Aman Gottumukkala, an Indian-origin engineer, is joining Elon Musk's xAI. He previously founded Firebender, an AI coding assistant for Android developers. This startup reportedly earned millions with a team of just three. Gottumukkala's move highlights a new era where small teams leverage AI to build successful products. He will now focus on advanced coding AI systems at xAI.
